merchant.body: Zero-friction commerce for South African merchants. Customers browse and buy without ever leaving WhatsApp.
merchant.sub: Powered by Stitch · Invite-only · R499/mo flat, everything included

customer.body: Discover South African merchants and buy from them directly on WhatsApp. No downloads, no accounts — just tap and shop.
customer.sub: Secure checkout · Stitch · Works on any phone

HowItWorks.heading: Invite to first sale
HowItWorks.subtext: Onboarding is built so that merchants who've never sold online can be live before lunch.
HowItWorks.ctaSub: Limited merchant spots available on our invite-only launch.

steps.title: Apply for an invite
steps.body: Omeru is invite-only. Click 'Apply as a merchant' on the site. We review your business and activate your account within 24 hours.

steps.title: Set up your Omeru HQ store
steps.body: Add products, set prices, and connect Stitch instant EFT — all from your Omeru HQ dashboard. Manage your entire store from any browser, on any device.

steps.title: Share your store link
steps.body: Send customers a WhatsApp link. They browse, order, and pay without leaving the chat. You get instant alerts for every new order.

steps.title: Get paid, grow
steps.body: Stitch settles payments directly to your bank. Manage orders and analytics on Omeru HQ. Receive WhatsApp alerts for every order and payment — then scale to multiple locations.

Features.heading:
Everything a merchant
actually needs.
Features.subtext: No bloat. Just the tools that turn WhatsApp conversations into revenue.

items.title: Native WhatsApp experience
items.body: Customers never leave WhatsApp. Browse, cart, checkout — all in the app they already spend hours in daily.

items.title: Stitch instant EFT
items.body: Instant EFT powered by Stitch. Customers pay from their banking app — no card needed. Funds settle directly to your account.

items.title: Real-time analytics
items.body: Track sales, top products, and customer behaviour. Know what's selling before it goes out of stock.

items.title: WhatsApp broadcasts
items.body: Send promotions and restock alerts to opted-in customers. Higher open rates than email, lower cost than SMS.

items.title: Multi-location support
items.body: Manage up to 3 locations from a single Pro dashboard. Consolidated reporting across all your stores.

items.title: Instant order alerts
items.body: Notified the moment an order is placed — via WhatsApp and your Omeru HQ dashboard. Accept, reject, or update customers from your phone or computer, in real time.

Testimonials.heading: Real merchants.
Testimonials.subtext: Merchants who applied for early access and went live in under 24 hours.

items.quote: I was selling pap and chakalaka through a simple WhatsApp group — no order tracking, no payments, just chaos. Omeru changed everything. Now customers browse, pick, and pay without calling me. I went from R4k to R18k a month in two months.

My biggest problem before Omeru was people ordering, then not paying. The payment integration means they only get the order confirmation once they've paid. My cash flow is night and day compared to before.

I'm not a tech person. I thought "online store" meant I needed a website and a developer. Omeru had me live in three hours and I made my first sale the same day. My customers didn't have to do anything new — they already had WhatsApp.
We sell to restaurants and home cooks. The broadcast feature is incredible — we sent one message about a new chilli blend and had 23 orders in 40 minutes. That's better than any marketing I've done.

Pricing.heading: One price.
Pricing.subtext: One flat monthly fee, 0% commission. You always know exactly what Omeru costs — and you keep every rand you sell.
Pricing.planDescription: Full platform access for every merchant. No tiers, no upgrades, no surprises — your costs stay flat while your sales scale.
Pricing.footerNote: Price in ZAR, VAT incl. Stitch instant EFT processing included. Merchant payouts go directly to your SA bank account. Cancel anytime.

items.a: Yes — and we mean it warmly, not as a barrier. We onboard merchants one at a time so we can actually help you get set up properly, answer questions, and make sure your first sale goes smoothly. Click 'Apply as a merchant' on this site and you'll hear back from us within 24 hours.

items.q: Do my customers need to download anything?
items.a: Not a thing. If your customer has WhatsApp — and in South Africa, that's almost everyone — they can shop from your store right now. No account to create, no app to install, no passwords. They tap your link and they're in. That's the whole point.

We use Stitch for secure instant EFT payments. Customers pay directly from their banking app — no card details required. Once a payment clears, the money settles directly to your SA bank account. We automatically deduct our commission so you never have to calculate it.

items.q: Are there product limits or plan tiers?
items.a: No. Omeru is one flat monthly fee with everything included — unlimited products, unlimited broadcasts, full analytics, services and bookings. There is nothing to upgrade to and no cap to hit. Your cost stays the same whether you list 5 products or 500.

items.q: Can I send promotions to my customers?
items.a: Absolutely. Every Omeru merchant can send unlimited WhatsApp broadcasts, with scheduling, to customers who've opted in to hear from you. WhatsApp open rates are typically 3× higher than email.

items.q: What is the Services module on Pro?
items.a: It's for merchants who sell time, not just things — think hair appointments, home deliveries, consulting sessions, repairs. The Services module lets you take bookings and payments for these alongside your physical products, all managed from your Omeru HQ dashboard.

items.q: What does "via Omeru" mean to my customers?
items.a: When a customer opens your store link, they see your brand — your name, your products, your prices. The "via Omeru" label just lets them know the platform is handling the secure checkout. Think of it the way you'd think of "Powered by Shopify" — it builds trust, not confusion.

Footer.ctaSub: Apply for an invite and start selling this week.
Footer.tagline: Zero-friction WhatsApp commerce for South African merchants.
